operatingRule: Zero unpaid interaction: no free calls, no bespoke advice in DMs, no unpaid document reviews.

dailyTheme.buyerProblem: AI pilot sprawl is creating activity without a clear Finance value case.
dailyTheme.audience: CFO, Finance Transformation Director, FP&A Director
dailyTheme.proofAngle: Use value, feasibility, risk, data readiness and adoption effort to decide what starts now.
dailyTheme.cta: If this is a live issue, use the free assistant to sharpen the question, then book the $350 Diagnostic Pack for tailored judgement.

secondaryTheme.buyerProblem: AI forecasting can improve speed, but leaders hesitate when the forecast becomes a black box.
secondaryTheme.audience: CFO, FP&A Director, Finance Business Partnering leader
secondaryTheme.proofAngle: Decision-sensitive use cases need transparent assumptions, challenge points and human ownership.
secondaryTheme.cta: The Diagnostic Pack helps separate useful augmentation from high-risk automation.

dailyActions: Schedule or publish one ready post.
Use the remaining posts as comments or queue material.
Paste inbound LinkedIn messages into Inbound Triage before replying.
Only route high-intent contacts to the paid Diagnostic Pack.
Send possible-fit contacts to the free assistant first.
Generate a bounded follow-up for any buyer who engaged but did not book.
Export the console report at week end.

followUps.draft:
Thanks for taking a look at the AI Finance Diagnostic Pack.

If this is a live Finance AI decision, the next step is deliberately simple: book the fixed-price pack and use the diagnostic tool before the session so the paid hour focuses on judgement, sequencing and next actions.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

If you are not ready to book, use the free assistant first to sharpen the question.

Good first step using the AI Finance Playbook / resources.

The point of the free preparation is to sharpen the question, not to replace tailored judgement. If the issue now feels live enough to need an independent view, the paid Diagnostic Pack is the route I use.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

This sounds relevant, but perhaps not yet urgent enough for paid diagnostic work.

A useful self-serve next step is to clarify which Finance decision or process is affected, what would make the use case valuable, and what adoption, data or control risk would stop it landing.

When this becomes a live decision, the paid Diagnostic Pack is the route for tailored judgement.

Thanks for reaching out. I am focused on paid AI Finance Transformation advisory for senior Finance leaders with live roadmap, adoption, governance or operating model questions, so I am probably not the right route for this.

You may still find the free resources useful here: https://www.seethenextmove.com/

disqualifiers: no ability or willingness to pay

posts.draft:
A Finance AI roadmap should start where the pain is visible.

CFO pain map: Layer 1 - what eats your calendar.

Problem to solve: chasing receipts.

Practical move: remove avoidable manual follow-up with better policy, capture, workflow nudges and exception handling.

Roadmap lens: Use value, feasibility, risk, data readiness and adoption effort to decide what starts now.

Audience this matters for: CFO, Finance Transformation Director, FP&A Director.

Bounded next step: If this is a live issue, use the free assistant to sharpen the question, then book the $350 Diagnostic Pack for tailored judgement.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

When Finance is still dealing with this problem, AI is not the starting point. Workflow design is.

CFO pain map: Layer 1 - what eats your calendar.

Problem to solve: fixing broken formulas.

Practical move: move critical reporting logic out of fragile spreadsheets into controlled data models and reviewed workflows.

Roadmap lens: Use value, feasibility, risk, data readiness and adoption effort to decide what starts now.

Audience this matters for: CFO, Finance Transformation Director, FP&A Director.

Bounded next step: If this is a live issue, use the free assistant to sharpen the question, then book the $350 Diagnostic Pack for tailored judgement.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

One reason AI Finance pilots stall: they do not solve a painful enough Finance problem.

CFO pain map: Layer 1 - what eats your calendar.

Problem to solve: manual data pulls from three systems.

Practical move: sequence data readiness, integration and ownership before promising automation benefits.

Roadmap lens: Use value, feasibility, risk, data readiness and adoption effort to decide what starts now.

Audience this matters for: CFO, Finance Transformation Director, FP&A Director.

Bounded next step: If this is a live issue, use the free assistant to sharpen the question, then book the $350 Diagnostic Pack for tailored judgement.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

The real Finance AI opportunity is not generic productivity. It is removing the work that drains CFO time and team capacity.

CFO pain map: Layer 1 - what eats your calendar.

Problem to solve: firefighting last-minute board requests.

Practical move: build reusable management insight packs with governed source data, clear definitions and rapid scenario support.

Roadmap lens: Decision-sensitive use cases need transparent assumptions, challenge points and human ownership.

Audience this matters for: CFO, FP&A Director, Finance Business Partnering leader.

Bounded next step: The Diagnostic Pack helps separate useful augmentation from high-risk automation.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

Before funding another AI Finance pilot, ask whether it will materially reduce a named Finance pain.

CFO pain map: Layer 1 - what eats your calendar.

Problem to solve: reconciling spreadsheet discrepancies.

Practical move: shift reconciliations towards controlled matching logic, exception workflow and accountable sign-off.

Roadmap lens: Decision-sensitive use cases need transparent assumptions, challenge points and human ownership.

Audience this matters for: CFO, FP&A Director, Finance Business Partnering leader.

Bounded next step: The Diagnostic Pack helps separate useful augmentation from high-risk automation.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone
